summary: Selective re-risk is allowed, but not chase mode. QQQ closed above the 732-733 confirmation gate and VIX is below 18, while QQQ remains below the 740 full risk-on gate and 10Y yield is still a valuation headwind. Keep the current book light, prepare MRVL first and AMD second, and use JPM as the first funding source if triggers confirm.

regime.marketGate: QQQ >733 confirms repair; QQQ >740 allows first controlled re-risk
regime.riskPause: Cancel new buys if QQQ <733 or VIX >18

active.trigger: Hold; add only if QQQ >740 or SMH retests 640-645 and holds
active.followUp: Current best risk-on exposure; do not add unless the index gate confirms.

active.recommendation: Hold short hedge / reduce on confirmation
active.followUp: Reduce hedge if QQQ >740 and VIX remains below 18.
No add; consider trim into 380-390 if tape weakens.
No new capital; tighten if it cannot reclaim 1,200.
First funding source for MRVL or AMD if QQQ confirms above 740.

watchlist.trigger: 285-292 pullback hold, or >300 breakout only with QQQ >740
watchlist.followUp: Starter size only; do not chase if QQQ stays below 740.

watchlist.trigger: QQQ >740 and AMD holds 570 or breaks 585-590
watchlist.followUp: Second new long after MRVL; high beta, so size smaller.
Good company, bad chase after +9% day.
Use as memory-cycle confirmation unless it consolidates.
